# pip-audit advisory allowlist
#
# The CI "security" job runs `pip-audit --strict` in BLOCKING mode: any known
# vulnerability in the resolved dependency tree fails the build. Use this file
# only to temporarily accept an advisory that cannot be fixed yet (e.g. no
# patched release exists, or it is a confirmed false positive for our usage).
#
# Format: one advisory ID per line (GHSA-xxxx-... or PYSEC-YYYY-NNN).
# Lines starting with `#` and blank lines are ignored.
#
# Rules:
#   - Add a comment above each ID with: why it is safe to ignore, and a link
#     to a tracking issue.
#   - Keep this list as short as possible; re-review on every dependency bump.
#   - Prefer upgrading the affected dependency over adding an entry here.
#
# Example (do not leave real entries here once resolved):
#   # GHSA-xxxx-yyyy-zzzz: <package> <version> — no fix released yet,
#   # not reachable from our code. Tracking: https://github.com/.../issues/NNN
#   GHSA-xxxx-yyyy-zzzz
